<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- Energy Potion does add current energy, but an immediate state poll can still show stale energy/playability; wait briefly and re-poll before acting on the result.
- Explosive Ampoule's 10 AoE can set up immediate Ravenous control in Corpse Slug fights by enabling a same-turn kill and survivor Stun.
- Attack Potion adds a free random Attack for the turn; hold for elite/boss kill turns or Pen Nib setup when possible.
- Attack Potion may open its choice screen on a delayed poll; resolve the card-select screen before assuming the prior play command completed.
- Dexterity Potion is worth prioritizing over single-use Block Potion when the deck has multiple repeatable block cards for a long elite/boss fight.
- Swift Potion cannot draw through Battle Trance's No Draw; use Swift before Battle Trance when both are available.
- Powdered Demise is useful against high-HP scaling enemies when the fight will last several turns, since it deals 9 HP loss at each enemy turn end.
- Gigantification Potion is a premium boss/elite potion when it can triple a large Attack into Vulnerable or a phase skip; often beats Flex Potion in decks with Break+, Bludgeon, Fiend Fire, or Music Box.
